name: Mapiro (SS-376)
events: 31 May 1945 USS Mapiro (Cdr. V.A. Sisler, Jr., USN) departed New Orleans, Louisiana for the Panama Canal Zone.
5 Jun 1945 USS Mapiro (Cdr. V.A. Sisler, Jr., USN) arrived in the Panama Canal Zone from New Orleans, Louisiana.
28 Jun 1945 After a period of training, USS Mapiro (Cdr. V.A. Sisler, Jr., USN), departed the Panama Canal Zone for Pearl Harbor.
15 Jul 1945 USS Mapiro (Cdr. V.A. Sisler, Jr., USN) arrived at Pearl Harbor.
4 Aug 1945 USS Mapiro (Cdr. V.A. Sisler, Jr.) departed from Pearl Harbor for her 1st war patrol. She was ordered to proceed to Saipan.
15 Aug 1945 USS Mapiro (Cdr. V.A. Sisler, Jr.) ended her 1st war patrol at Saipan due to the Japanese surrender.
